subject:
Re: TensorFlow Exception during preprocessing - teamtomo HIV
 tutorial
body:
I believe your Quadro is too old, based on the info here: 
http://www.warpem.com/warp/?page_id=65
You have a Kepler-based card, but Warp requires the generation that 
followed (Maxwell).

/Andreas

torsdag den 25. august 2022 kl. 22.39.43 UTC+2 skrev dennisj...@gmail.com:

> Hello,
>
> Here is some contextual info...
>
> GPU = Quadro K6000
> Dedicated video memory = 1288 MB GDDR5
> Driver version = 473.47
> CUDA driver version = 11.4.231
>
> Once I hit "*START PROCESSING*", this error (see below) occurs while 
> loading the BoxNet model trained for gold fiducial masking, GoldNet. I also 
> tried this with another pretrained BoxNet model but the same error occurs.
>
> Anyone have suggestions for this? 
>
> *Oopsie *
>
> *There was an error loading the specified BoxNet model for picking. *
>
> *The exception raised is: *
>
> *TensorFlow.TFException: Generic conv implementation only supports NHWC 
> tensor format for now.*
>
> *    [[Node: conv2d/Conv2D = Conv2D[T=DT_FLOAT, 
> _output_shapes=[[?,32,256,256]], data_format="NCHW", dilations = [1, 1, 1, 
> 1), padding="SAME", strides=(1, 1, 1, 1), use_cudnn_on_gpu=true, 
> _device="/job:localhost/ replica:0/task:0/device:CPU:0"](transpose, 
> conv2d/kernel/read)]]*
>
> *    at TensorFlow.TFStatus.CheckMaybeRaise(TFStatus incomingStatus, 
> Boolean last) in D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib \TensorFlowSharp\Tensorflow.cs:line 
> 351 *
>
> *    at TensorFlow.TFSession.Run(TFOutput[] inputs, TFTensor[] 
> inputValues, TFOutput[] outputs, TFOperation() targetOpers, TFBuffer 
> runMetadata, TFBuffer runOptions, TFStatus status) in D:\Dev warp2\WarpLib 
> \TensorFlowSharp Tensorflow.cs:line 2681*
>
> *    at TensorFlow.TFSession.Runner.Run(TFStatus status) in D:\Dev 
> warp2\WarpLib\TensorFlowSharp\Tensorflow.cs:line 2592*
>
> *    at Warp.BoxNet2.Predict(Single[] data, Int32 threadID, Int64[]& 
> argmax, Single[& probability) in D:\Dev\warp2 WarpLib\BoxNet2.cs:line 173 *
>
> *    at Warp.BoxNet2..ctor(String modelDir, Int32 devicelD, Int32 
> nThreads, Int32 batchSize, Boolean for Training) in D: 
> \Dev\warp2\WarpLib\BoxNet2.cs:line 153 *
>
> *    at Warp.MainWindow.<>c_DisplayClass64_1.<b_0>d. MoveNext() in D:\Dev 
> warp2\Warp\MainWindow.xaml.cs:line 1191*
>
>
